records.m_Talk_ENG: Welcome back, Dame Grace. It seems the selection of your Armament went more smoothly than usual this time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Welcome back, Dame Grace. It seems the selection of your Armament went more smoothly than usual this time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Welcome back, Dame Grace. It seems the selection of your Armament went more smoothly than usual this time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Indeed. As if blessed by Aquarius, the young lady I met was as clear and calm as water.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Indeed. As if blessed by Aquarius, the young lady I met was as clear and calm as water.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Indeed. As if blessed by Aquarius, the young lady I met was as clear and calm as water.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I returned earlier than planned, so Rougi959 looked quite displeased.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I returned earlier than planned, so Rougi959 looked quite displeased.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I returned earlier than planned, so Rougi959 looked quite displeased.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You left without saying a word to your knights again, didn't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You left without saying a word to your knights again, didn't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You left without saying a word to your knights again, didn't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, I did want to surprise them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, I did want to surprise them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, I did want to surprise them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes, I'm sure they were very surprised.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes, I'm sure they were very surprised.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes, I'm sure they were very surprised.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here. A simple brew from an old man's shallow wisdom.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here. A simple brew from an old man's shallow wisdom.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here. A simple brew from an old man's shallow wisdom.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah... thank you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah... thank you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah... thank you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Think nothing of it. I only regret I couldn't offer you a proper tea service.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Think nothing of it. I only regret I couldn't offer you a proper tea service.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Think nothing of it. I only regret I couldn't offer you a proper tea service.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll take my leave now. Please enjoy a relaxed conversation with Dame Grace.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll take my leave now. Please enjoy a relaxed conversation with Dame Grace.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll take my leave now. Please enjoy a relaxed conversation with Dame Grace.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now that we've something to soothe the throat, shall we continue?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now that we've something to soothe the throat, shall we continue?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now that we've something to soothe the throat, shall we continue?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is there anything else you wish to ask me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is there anything else you wish to ask me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is there anything else you wish to ask me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...A knight I met earlier said you were heir to House Birmingham.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...A knight I met earlier said you were heir to House Birmingham.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...A knight I met earlier said you were heir to House Birmingham.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is there a problem?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is there a problem?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is there a problem?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A lot! Sir Allen said the heir of that house passed away years ago!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A lot! Sir Allen said the heir of that house passed away years ago!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A lot! Sir Allen said the heir of that house passed away years ago!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Birmingham line was declared extinct!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Birmingham line was declared extinct!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Birmingham line was declared extinct!

records.m_Talk_ENG: My, such a fierce glare. It almost makes me afraid to finish what I was about to say.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My, such a fierce glare. It almost makes me afraid to finish what I was about to say.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My, such a fierce glare. It almost makes me afraid to finish what I was about to say.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As you suspect, I am not Grace Birmingham.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As you suspect, I am not Grace Birmingham.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As you suspect, I am not Grace Birmingham.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And yet, I am also Grace Birmingham.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And yet, I am also Grace Birmingham.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And yet, I am also Grace Birmingham.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you mocking me right now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you mocking me right now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you mocking me right now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How disappointing. What sort of noble would joke about something so serious?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How disappointing. What sort of noble would joke about something so serious?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How disappointing. What sort of noble would joke about something so serious?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I simply cannot reveal the full truth so directly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I simply cannot reveal the full truth so directly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I simply cannot reveal the full truth so directly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if I told you everything now, it wouldn't be the truth you seek.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if I told you everything now, it wouldn't be the truth you seek.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if I told you everything now, it wouldn't be the truth you seek.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...So you have no intention of giving me a real answer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...So you have no intention of giving me a real answer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...So you have no intention of giving me a real answer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for your concern, but I'll be taking my leave.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for your concern, but I'll be taking my leave.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for your concern, but I'll be taking my leave.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So soon? I haven't even repaid you for your escort.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So soon? I haven't even repaid you for your escort.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So soon? I haven't even repaid you for your escort.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This isn't much, but consider it a parting gift.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This isn't much, but consider it a parting gift.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This isn't much, but consider it a parting gift.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A map of the Empire. You'll be returning soon enough, so it's best to know where the County estate lies.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A map of the Empire. You'll be returning soon enough, so it's best to know where the County estate lies.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A map of the Empire. You'll be returning soon enough, so it's best to know where the County estate lies.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you wish, I can assign someone to accompany you. What will it be?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you wish, I can assign someone to accompany you. What will it be?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you wish, I can assign someone to accompany you. What will it be?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm grateful. I'll be off, then.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm grateful. I'll be off, then.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm grateful. I'll be off, then.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's been a while, Esther. Precisely eighteen hours, in fact.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's been a while, Esther. Precisely eighteen hours, in fact.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's been a while, Esther. Precisely eighteen hours, in fact.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you enjoy the sights of the capital?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you enjoy the sights of the capital?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you enjoy the sights of the capital?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The geography was unfamiliar, but even the currency and basic knowledge seemed foreign.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The geography was unfamiliar, but even the currency and basic knowledge seemed foreign.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The geography was unfamiliar, but even the currency and basic knowledge seemed foreign.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's to be expected. This is Central Palace, after all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's to be expected. This is Central Palace, after all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's to be expected. This is Central Palace, after all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've never heard of such a place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've never heard of such a place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've never heard of such a place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why would you have? It's a civilization not recorded in any old text.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why would you have? It's a civilization not recorded in any old text.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why would you have? It's a civilization not recorded in any old text.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's troubling when dreams blur into reality just because they feel vivid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's troubling when dreams blur into reality just because they feel vivid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's troubling when dreams blur into reality just because they feel vivid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've drawn the Virgo Sword, haven't you? You must be used to strange experiences by now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've drawn the Virgo Sword, haven't you? You must be used to strange experiences by now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've drawn the Virgo Sword, haven't you? You must be used to strange experiences by now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If this is a dream, my senses are far too clear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If this is a dream, my senses are far too clear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If this is a dream, my senses are far too clear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then it must be a lucid dream.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then it must be a lucid dream.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then it must be a lucid dream.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh...*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh...*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: I recall something similar from the Qliphoth Game report.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I recall something similar from the Qliphoth Game report.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I recall something similar from the Qliphoth Game report.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Some at the scene saw illusions of the past due to the Demon Lord's powers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Some at the scene saw illusions of the past due to the Demon Lord's powers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Some at the scene saw illusions of the past due to the Demon Lord's powers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you one of the Apostles... from the Knights of Redemption?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you one of the Apostles... from the Knights of Redemption?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you one of the Apostles... from the Knights of Redemption?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Demon Lord is dead. How could an Apostle still remain?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Demon Lord is dead. How could an Apostle still remain?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Demon Lord is dead. How could an Apostle still remain?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If that were true, then something in your premise must be off, or another force is at play.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If that were true, then something in your premise must be off, or another force is at play.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If that were true, then something in your premise must be off, or another force is at play.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Even if you're not an Apostle, I've seen a Shadow manipulate a dimensional pocket.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Even if you're not an Apostle, I've seen a Shadow manipulate a dimensional pocket.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Even if you're not an Apostle, I've seen a Shadow manipulate a dimensional pocket.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This place doesn't feel like the real world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This place doesn't feel like the real world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This place doesn't feel like the real world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Impressive. Even with your thinking constrained, you managed to reach a conclusion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Impressive. Even with your thinking constrained, you managed to reach a conclusion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Impressive. Even with your thinking constrained, you managed to reach a conclusion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're half correct. This place is indeed tied to my existence.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're half correct. This place is indeed tied to my existence.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're half correct. This place is indeed tied to my existence.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then why capture me here? What was your purpose?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then why capture me here? What was your purpose?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then why capture me here? What was your purpose?

records.m_Talk_ENG: "Capture" is not quite right. You arrived here by fate. And by destiny.
records.m_Talk_DEU: "Capture" is not quite right. You arrived here by fate. And by destiny.
records.m_Talk_FRA: "Capture" is not quite right. You arrived here by fate. And by destiny.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still... I won't deny that I have personal motives as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still... I won't deny that I have personal motives as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still... I won't deny that I have personal motives as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now that the many tangled threads have begun to unravel, the stars are falling back into orbit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now that the many tangled threads have begun to unravel, the stars are falling back into orbit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now that the many tangled threads have begun to unravel, the stars are falling back into orbit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But those that remain out of alignment have lost their light. They can't even illuminate the path ahead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But those that remain out of alignment have lost their light. They can't even illuminate the path ahead.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But those that remain out of alignment have lost their light. They can't even illuminate the path ahead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I want you to listen to the stories of those stars.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I want you to listen to the stories of those stars.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I want you to listen to the stories of those stars.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stories of the stars...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stories of the stars...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stories of the stars...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Every story begins with a question. There's no need to understand right away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Every story begins with a question. There's no need to understand right away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Every story begins with a question. There's no need to understand right away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you were right. This place is a reconstruction of the past as you speculated.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you were right. This place is a reconstruction of the past as you speculated.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you were right. This place is a reconstruction of the past as you speculated.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And when the story reaches its end, you'll reach the truth in one form or another.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And when the story reaches its end, you'll reach the truth in one form or another.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And when the story reaches its end, you'll reach the truth in one form or another.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I can't tell if your words are true or false, but let me ask you one last thing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I can't tell if your words are true or false, but let me ask you one last thing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I can't tell if your words are true or false, but let me ask you one last thing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who... are you, really?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who... are you, really?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who... are you, really?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't answer that yet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't answer that yet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't answer that yet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because finding that answer is part of your journey.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because finding that answer is part of your journey.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because finding that answer is part of your journey.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Welcome back, Dame Grace. It seems the selection of your Armament went more smoothly than usual this time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If that were true, then something in your premise must be off, or another force is at play.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If that were true, then something in your premise must be off, or another force is at play.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If that were true, then something in your premise must be off, or another force is at play.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Even if you're not an Apostle, I've seen a Shadow manipulate a dimensional pocket.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Even if you're not an Apostle, I've seen a Shadow manipulate a dimensional pocket.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Even if you're not an Apostle, I've seen a Shadow manipulate a dimensional pocket.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This place doesn't feel like the real world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This place doesn't feel like the real world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This place doesn't feel like the real world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Impressive. Even with your thinking constrained, you managed to reach a conclusion.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Impressive. Even with your thinking constrained, you managed to reach a conclusion.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Impressive. Even with your thinking constrained, you managed to reach a conclusion.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're half correct. This place is indeed tied to my existence.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're half correct. This place is indeed tied to my existence.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're half correct. This place is indeed tied to my existence.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then why capture me here? What was your purpose?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then why capture me here? What was your purpose?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then why capture me here? What was your purpose?

root.m_Talk_ENG: "Capture" is not quite right. You arrived here by fate. And by destiny.
root.m_Talk_DEU: "Capture" is not quite right. You arrived here by fate. And by destiny.
root.m_Talk_FRA: "Capture" is not quite right. You arrived here by fate. And by destiny.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still... I won't deny that I have personal motives as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Still... I won't deny that I have personal motives as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Still... I won't deny that I have personal motives as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now that the many tangled threads have begun to unravel, the stars are falling back into orbit.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now that the many tangled threads have begun to unravel, the stars are falling back into orbit.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now that the many tangled threads have begun to unravel, the stars are falling back into orbit.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But those that remain out of alignment have lost their light. They can't even illuminate the path ahead.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But those that remain out of alignment have lost their light. They can't even illuminate the path ahead.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But those that remain out of alignment have lost their light. They can't even illuminate the path ahead.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I want you to listen to the stories of those stars.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I want you to listen to the stories of those stars.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I want you to listen to the stories of those stars.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stories of the stars...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stories of the stars...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stories of the stars...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Every story begins with a question. There's no need to understand right away.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Every story begins with a question. There's no need to understand right away.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Every story begins with a question. There's no need to understand right away.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But you were right. This place is a reconstruction of the past as you speculated.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But you were right. This place is a reconstruction of the past as you speculated.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But you were right. This place is a reconstruction of the past as you speculated.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And when the story reaches its end, you'll reach the truth in one form or another.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And when the story reaches its end, you'll reach the truth in one form or another.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And when the story reaches its end, you'll reach the truth in one form or another.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I can't tell if your words are true or false, but let me ask you one last thing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I can't tell if your words are true or false, but let me ask you one last thing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I can't tell if your words are true or false, but let me ask you one last thing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who... are you, really?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who... are you, really?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who... are you, really?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can't answer that yet.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can't answer that yet.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can't answer that yet.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because finding that answer is part of your journey.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because finding that answer is part of your journey.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because finding that answer is part of your journey.
